mapper.insert: INSERT INTO delivery_issue (shipment_id, order_id, user_id, issue_type, description, photos, status, admin_id, admin_remark, handled_at) VALUES (#{shipmentId}, #{orderId}, #{userId}, #{issueType}, #{description}, #{photos}, #{status}, #{adminId}, #{adminRemark}, #{handledAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE delivery_issue SET issue_type = #{issueType}, description = #{description}, photos = #{photos}, status = #{status}, admin_id = #{adminId}, admin_remark = #{adminRemark}, handled_at = #{handledAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM delivery_issue WHERE shipment_id = #{shipmentId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM delivery_issue WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE delivery_issue SET status = #{status}, admin_id = #{adminId}, admin_remark = #{adminRemark}, handled_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
